'''thazhono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilskins|oilskins]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-zh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilskins|oilskins]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thazhono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæzheneth|thæzheneth]] || [[word:thæzhenej|thæzhenej]] || [[word:thæzhenesh|thæzhenesh]] || [[word:thæzhene|thæzhene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazhozhonoth|thazhozhonoth]] || [[word:thazhozhonoj|thazhozhonoj]] || [[word:thazhozhonosh|thazhozhonosh]] || [[word:thazhozhono|thazhozhono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhonoth|thazhonoth]] || [[word:thazhonoj|thazhonoj]] || [[word:thazhonosh|thazhonosh]] || [[word:thazhono|thazhono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhofnoth|thazhofnoth]] || [[word:thazhofnoj|thazhofnoj]] || [[word:thazhofnosh|thazhofnosh]] || [[word:thazhofnof|thazhofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thazhonotho|thazhonotho]] || [[word:thazhonojo|thazhonojo]] || [[word:thazhonosho|thazhonosho]] || [[word:thazhonoko|thazhonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thazhonoth|thazhonoth]] || [[word:thazhonoj|thazhonoj]] || [[word:thazhonosh|thazhonosh]] || [[word:thazhono|thazhono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thazhonothol|thazhonothol]] || [[word:thazhonojol|thazhonojol]] || [[word:thazhonoshol|thazhonoshol]] || [[word:thazhonokol|thazhonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thazhonothotho|thazhonothotho]] || [[word:thazhonojojo|thazhonojojo]] || [[word:thazhonoshosho|thazhonoshosho]] || [[word:thazhonoko|thazhonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thazhonothon|thazhonothon]] || [[word:thazhonojon|thazhonojon]] || [[word:thazhonoshon|thazhonoshon]] || [[word:thazhonokon|thazhonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thazhonothoro|thazhonothoro]] || [[word:thazhonojoro|thazhonojoro]] || [[word:thazhonoshoro|thazhonoshoro]] || [[word:thazhonokoro|thazhonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
